series_metadata.series_description: Provides information regarding the certification status of various health care facilities. Included are applications to become a provider, disclosure of ownership and control interest statements, certification & transmittal forms, statements of deficienc

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain exit interview tapes for 5 years then erase, provided that no legal action is to be taken against the facility and all appeals have been resolve ; Paper: Retain in office for 3 years after the year in which the record was prepared. Store for 2 years offsite, then destroy provided that no legal actions is to be taken against the facility and all appeals have been resolved, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
